title: Mapping Confidence Score
description: Confidence assessment for a mapping specification or individual field mapping. Derived automatically by the mapping engine or assigned by a human reviewer.

level.description: Categorical label derived from score: low <0.5, medium 0.5–0.8, high 0.8–0.95, certain ≥0.95

method.description: How this confidence score was determined

basis.description: Human-readable explanation of what drives this confidence score

assessedBy.description: Identifier of the system or person who assessed this confidence
